nasb.text: Then Shaphan brought the book to the king and reported further word to the king, saying, “Everything that was entrusted to your servants they are doing.

esv.text: Shaphan brought the book to the king, and further reported to the king, “All that was committed to your servants they are doing.

cnv.text: 沙番把書帶到王那裡，同時向王報告：“你交託你僕人的事，他們都辦妥了。

ccb.text: 沙番把书卷带到王那里，向王禀告说：“凡交给仆人们办的事，都已办妥。
